# Copilot Instructions

- This workspace contains a Next.js 14 App Router project for Distribuidora Paucara.
- Keep the UI focused on wholesale beer distribution, voucher access, and MikroTik HotSpot integration.
- Use TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and PostgreSQL helpers under `src/lib`.
- PostgreSQL settings come from `.env.local` with `DB_CONNECTION=pgsql`, `DB_HOST=127.0.0.1`, `DB_PORT=5432`, `DB_DATABASE=control`, `DB_USERNAME=postgres`, and `DB_PASSWORD=1234`.
- Prefer small, production-oriented changes that preserve the existing brand and structure.
